title: IMAP connection fails due to SSL renegotiation error
symptom: When attempting to connect to an IMAP server, n8n throws an SSL error regarding unsafe legacy renegotiation. This prevents testing credentials or running workflows that require this connection.
applies_when: Docker setup with specific SSL configurations
root_cause: The error occurs because the OpenSSL library used by Node.js has disabled unsafe legacy renegotiation for security reasons. This can affect connections to servers that require this type of renegotiation.
fix_steps: Set the environment variable NODE_OPTIONS to include '--openssl-legacy-provider --openssl-shared-config --openssl-config=/etc/ssl/openssl.cnf'.
Restart the n8n service to apply the new environment variable settings.
agent_instruction: Update the NODE_OPTIONS environment variable and restart the n8n service.
